name: get-initials
visual_summary: The get-initials component is used to extract the initials from a given name. It typically consists of 2-3 characters and returns them in uppercase. Developers would use this component for displaying names in a compact form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: get-initials
Description: The get-initials component is used to extract the initials from a given name. It typically consists of 2-3 characters and returns them in uppercase. Developers would use this component for displaying names in a compact form.
Style: none
Interactions: none
Tags: text, formatting, name

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Avatar/get-initials/get-initials.ts
export function getInitials(name: string, limit = 2) {
  const splitted = name.split(' ');

  if (splitted.length === 1) {
    return name.slice(0, limit).toUpperCase();
  }

  return splitted
    .map((word) => word[0])
    .slice(0, limit)
    .join('')
    .toUpperCase();
}
